full_text:
Xiang Yan 相嚴
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiang Yan (相嚴). A local leader in Wuling who rallied others to Wei’s cause against Wu. Xiang Yan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
